setDistributionAllowanceAsFail: UPDATE "AllowanceJobRecord" SET "result" = 'FAIL' WHERE "tenantId"  = (SELECT "tenantId" FROM "AllowanceJobRecord" WHERE "tenantId" = 'tenantCode' ORDER BY "createdAt" desc LIMIT 1);commit;
setDistributionAllowanceAsSuccess: UPDATE "AllowanceJobRecord" SET "result" = 'SUCCESS' WHERE "tenantId"  = (SELECT "tenantId" FROM "AllowanceJobRecord" WHERE "tenantId" = 'tenantCode' ORDER BY "createdAt" desc LIMIT 1);commit;
getTheEmailOfUsersWhichCurrencyIsNull:
SELECT u.email,u.*
FROM "User" u 
inner JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON ("tenantId", "userId") *
    FROM "UserConfig"
    WHERE "tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
      AND "isDeleted" = false
    ORDER BY "tenantId", "userId", "versionId" DESC
) uc ON u."tenantId" = uc."tenantId" AND u."userId" = uc."userId"
WHERE u."tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
  AND u."isActive" = true
  AND uc."payCurrency" IS null;
setTheLatestCreatedDateFromAllowanceJobR:
WITH sub AS (
  SELECT ctid, ("createdAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS lastcreation
  FROM "AllowanceJobRecord"
  WHERE "tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
  ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC, "allowanceTime" DESC LIMIT 1
) UPDATE "AllowanceJobRecord" a SET "createdAt" = LEAST(sub.lastcreation, ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour 1 minute')) FROM sub WHERE a.ctid = sub.ctid 
RETURNING a.*, sub.lastcreation AS previous_createdAt,((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour 1 minute') AS target_createdAt;
getTheLatestWorkAnniversaryInstance:
SELECT
   mi."year",
   mi.title 
FROM "Recognition" r
INNER JOIN "Recipient" rec ON r."id" = rec."recognitionId"
INNER JOIN "MilestoneInstance" mi ON r."milestoneInstanceId" = mi."id"
WHERE rec."userId" = 'userCode'
    AND rec."tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
    AND r."milestoneInstanceId" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY mi."year" DESC;
updateTheUserStartDateUtc:
WITH params(n) AS (VALUES (nthValue))
UPDATE "User" u2
SET "startDateUtc" = COALESCE(u2."startDateUtc", (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')) - (params.n || ' years')::interval
FROM params
WHERE u2."tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
  AND u2."userId"   = 'userCode';
selectRecognitionsByUserAndTenant: SELECT rec."recognitionId" as "recognitionId", mi."year", mi."title" FROM "Recognition" r INNER JOIN "Recipient" rec ON r."id" = rec."recognitionId" INNER JOIN "MilestoneInstance" mi ON r."milestoneInstanceId" = mi."id" WHERE rec."userId" in (userIdsString) AND rec."tenantId" = 'tenantCode' AND r."milestoneInstanceId" IS NOT null ORDER BY mi."year" DESC;
setTheStartUtcDateToTheUsers:
UPDATE "User"
SET "startDateUtc" = NOW()
WHERE "userId" IN (userIdsString)
AND "tenantId" = 'tenantCode';commit;
setTheStartUtcDateToTheUserByIncreasingY: UPDATE "User" SET "startDateUtc" = "startDateUtc" - make_interval(years => numberOfYears) WHERE "userId" IN (userIdsString) AND "tenantId" = 'tenantCode';COMMIT;
